history.issue: <details><summary>Key safety features</summary> inner markdown bullets emitted as literal text
history.fix: Added _render_html_block() in render_html.py — <details> blocks now recursively parse inner content as Markdown (GFM convention)

history.issue: Privacy + byline pass — verified no absolute /Users/... path leaks, author byline renders correctly with CJK characters intact, SHA256 fingerprint retained for drift detection
history.fix: Renderer: added _repo_relative() helper for display path; added --author flag + {{BYLINE_BLOCK}} placeholder; templates render byline between subtitle and meta strip

summary: Three-round review: WARN (details inner MD not parsed) → fix renderer → PASS → add author byline + privacy-clean repo-relative path → PASS again. 11 checks pass on run 3.
